text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As predicted, the storm has come.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, you look ready for the Kikuka
Sho. A spot in the race is surely yours if you want
it!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
They say that if you decide to enter, you could
upend the entire race. So, what are your thoughts
on the matter?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I plan on taking part, of course. I've spent my
summer preparing for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She's entering after all, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Come on, there's something I need to talk to her
about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before their decisive race, Mejiro Ryan wants to
check in with McQueen to speak about their
plans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's not here yet. I'm sure this is where we were
supposed to meet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hello, Ryan. My apologies—am I tardy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No, I think that we were just early.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So, McQueen, the media said you could upend
the race. But that's not what you're aiming to do,
is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, indeed not. My plans haven't changed. It is
only the opinions of others that have.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've also heard people say that they didn't expect
you to be a lead player in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But... aren't they right about that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe so. I've always expected you to
contend well, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's only you who doesn't realize it yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both understand each other very well. And
that's exactly why they can't settle their rivalry in
any simple manner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Ryan hopes to beat McQueen, she'll have to
surpass her in raw ability first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So, Ryan, have you found anyone more capable
than I am?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is a 3,000-meter race. It's my
specialty as a stayer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As you saw in our scrimmage before, without a
strategy, I have the advantage against you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What kind of weapon do you have that can
defeat me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A weapon?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I... I have a few...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Like my dashing, my explosive force, my staying
power, my final sprint... But...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Will that really work? I always lose against
McQueen...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(I'm so scared... I can't help but think about how I
always lost when we were kids.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Can I really stand a chance against her? Even
with everything I've learned, I'm afraid... Why...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Her muscles? Whatever do you mean, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am aware of how splendid her physique is. But I
also know that muscles alone are not enough for
her to defeat me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's right, Trainer. My muscles aren't
enough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We change locations to the pool.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Um... I changed clothes, but I'm not sure what this
is supposed to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goodness... what a change. You're completely
different from this past spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your muscle tone is the same, but your body
looks much more conditioned to exert power in
racing. This is...
choice_data_list: The results of putting in the right effort.
The results of putting in the right effort.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: The right effort? You mean...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mean everything she's done so far. It's true that
Mejiro Ryan can't compete with Mejiro McQueen
when it comes to perfection.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's also why she never gave up in her
effort. She fights on, turning those feelings of
inferiority into muscle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A youth of sweat and tears—their rivalry exposed
Ryan's weaknesses, but it also gave birth to her
current physique.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I understand now. It's plain to see when you look
at her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, I can see that you are continuing your
journey down an unchanging path, and you're
doing it with extraordinary speed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I-I am? I don't really understand it myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Like always, you're unable to see it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But that's precisely why you can move forward
without hesitation. You've found yourself a good
partner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is a pleasure to have you as an opponent. So
believe in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Believe in the Ryan that your trainer and I believe
in. As long as you run with all of your strength,
then I'm certain it will be a good race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Run with all my strength... O-okay. That's
something I can definitely promise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can say with confidence that I've worked hard
toward this day, all so I can beat you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan has gained the confidence she needs
to compete. The great battle between the two
Mejiro rivals is about to begin.
